title: gladiolus erectiflorus var. verdickii
intro: Gladiolus erectiflorus var. verdickii, also known as the Verdick's sword lily, is a plant species in the family Iridaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its root, which is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the root is often dried and made into tea or capsules, or used in traditional remedies such as infusions and decoctions.
